title: Freeze and version the evaluation dataset
description: Golden data is versioned and frozen so scores are comparable over time and the set is not edited to flatter a system.
body: Use when an eval set is reused across releases. Do not silently add, remove, or relabel cases between runs, and avoid editing the golden answer to match a model's output. Actions: version the dataset, record which version produced each score, and gate changes to the set through review separate from the system change. Validation signals include a dataset version stamped on every reported score and a diff review for any set change. Risk boundary: editing the golden set alongside the system change makes the comparison meaningless; freeze the set or version-bump it deliberately, not to chase a number.
